name: Dynamic Tags
description: Dynamically strips priority prefixes, formats multi-word tags, and customizes base tag styling. In v1.5.0 added new tags: #Pending, #In-progress, #Submitted, #In-review, #Success, #Failed, #Expired. In v1.5.5 added Nested Tags. In v1.6.0 added #Re-schedule status tag.
author: Waghmare
